parents.subject: LU-14286 tests: reduce fallocate space sanity 150e

commit.subject: LU-10407 osc: update size before queue page
commit.message:
LU-10407 osc: update size before queue page

In osc_io_commit_async, the inode's size should be updated
before the corresponding page is queued to some osc_extent.

Change-Id: I57e0e3acb20518148dceec9de0a305335ecf30ce
Signed-off-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao.zhang@intel.com>
